Wolf Freedom of Religion or Belief Victims List Country Profiles Defending Freedoms Project Publications " class="we-megamenu-nolink"> Annual Reports Contact Us Facebook Twitter YouTube Instagram Search Uzbekistan View the Uzbekistan chapters in our annual reports > Recent News Events Publications Advising Government Religious freedom conditions in Uzbekistan continue to deteriorate as the government retreats from previous reforms. Authorities have increasingly invoked an expanding and restrictive legal framework to target Muslims who deviate from the state’s preferred interpretation of Islam as well as members of other religious groups. The state routinely penalizes peaceful activities, including religious expression and education, through detention, fines, and prison sentences.
